title: Various Raids into the Byzantine Lands, and Measures against the Protected Peoples
description: and Measures against the Protected Peoples In this year, Yazid b. Makhlad al-Hubayri (al-Fazirn raided the Byzantine lands with a force of ten thousand men. The Byzantines 923. lbn al-Ahhir, loc. cit. On liammid, see Tabu!, ID, 649 (above, 173 and n. 632). According to Ya'qubi, Ta'n7ih, 11, 498-9, Haminid had been appointed governor of Yemen in 179 (795), but his tyranny drove the local people into rebellion, led by al-Haysam b. 'Abd al-Magid al-Hamdani.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
